title: Growth Energy Urges USTR to Tear Down U.S. Ethanol Export Barriers
content: Growth Energy, the nationâ€™s largest biofuel trade association, offered the Trump administration a list of foreign trade barriers that should be targeted for elimination by the U.S. Trade Representative (USTR). Growth Energy shared the information as part of comments filed in response to the America First Trade Policy Presidential Memorandum and the Presidential Memorandum on Reciprocal Trade and Tariffs.
author: Analysts Account
